title: Montis Financial LLC Has $19.84 Million Stake in Apple Inc. $AAPL
sentences: Montis Financial LLC Has $19.84 Million Stake in Apple Inc. $AAPL Montis Financial LLC increased its stake in Apple Inc. by 15.8% to 77,919 shares, valued at $19.84 million, making Apple its seventh-largest holding.
This comes as Apple surpassed quarterly expectations with robust EPS and revenue figures, revenue growth, and a declared dividend.
Analyst sentiment toward Apple remains largely positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and upward adjustments to price targets from several brokerages.
